exercises.title: Secure Memory Manager
exercises.description: Implement a secure memory management class for cryptographic secrets.
tasks: Create secure allocation with optional locking
Add context manager support for automatic cleanup
Test for memory leaks and incomplete cleanup
exercises.expectedOutput: Secure memory class with verified zeroization
hints: Use volatile semantics or memory barriers
Test by inspecting raw memory after cleanup

exercises.title: Input Validation Framework
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive input validation framework for PQC.
tasks: Validate public key structure and bounds
exercises.expectedOutput: Input validation framework with test cases
hints: Define expected sizes for each parameter set
Error messages shouldn't leak sensitive info

exercises.title: Nonce Misuse Detector
exercises.description: Create a tool to detect nonce misuse in signature logs.
tasks: Track nonces used per signing key
exercises.expectedOutput: Nonce misuse detection and prevention tool
hints: Consider storage limits for long-running systems

exercises.title: Security Code Review Tool
exercises.description: Design an automated code review checklist for PQC implementations.
tasks: Define security-critical code patterns to check
hints: Check buffer sizes against parameter sets
Verify cleanup code isn't optimized away
